'''√zh-th-n''' ('''kazhathan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quartile|quartile]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-th-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quartile|quartile]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √zh-th-n
|-
! Lemma
| kazhathan
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thizhathan || jizhathan || shizhathan || kizhathan
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuzhathan || jujuzhathan || shushuzhathan || kukuzhathan
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuzhathan || juzhathan || shuzhathan || kuzhathan
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuzhathan || juzhathan || shuzhathan || kuzhathan
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thezhathan || jezhathan || shezhathan || kezhathan
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothozhathan || jojozhathan || shoshozhathan || kokozhathan
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thozhathan || jozhathan || shozhathan || kozhathan
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thozhathan || jozhathan || shozhathan || kozhathan
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || zhathan || zhathan || zhathan || zhathan
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || zhathan || zhathan || zhathan || zhathan
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || zhathan || zhathan || zhathan || zhathan
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || zhathan || zhathan || zhathan || zhathan
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæzhathan || jæzhathan || shæzhathan || kæzhathan
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathazhathan || jajazhathan || shashazhathan || kakazhathan
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thazhathan || jazhathan || shazhathan || kazhathan
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thazhathan || jazhathan || shazhathan || kazhathan
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shazhathan
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshazhathan
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishazhathan
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shazhathannü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshazhathannknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishazhathannü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shazhathanshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshazhathannkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishazhathanshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shazhathanro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshazhathannkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishazhathanro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shazhathanmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshazhathannkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishazhathanmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shazhathansher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshazhathannksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishazhathansher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shazhathanng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshazhathannkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishazhathanng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shazhathanya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshazhathannkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishazhathanya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shazhathanyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshazhathannkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishazhathanyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shazhathannüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshazhathannknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishazhathannüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shazhathannüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshazhathannknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishazhathannüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shazhathannümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshazhathannknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishazhathannümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shazhathanshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshazhathannkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishazhathanshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shazhathanshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshazhathannkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishazhathanshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shazhathanshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshazhathannkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishazhathanshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shazhathanronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshazhathannkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishazhathanronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shazhathanroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshazhathannkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishazhathanroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shazhathanromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshazhathannkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishazhathanromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shazhathanmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshazhathannkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishazhathanmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shazhathanmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshazhathannkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishazhathanmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shazhathanmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshazhathannkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishazhathanmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
